description: A critical supplier has put a hold on shipments due to an overdue invoice. The department head has requested an urgent, off-cycle payment be made.

nodes.task_description: Identify the overdue invoice and confirm it is approved for payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the approved but unpaid invoice in the system.

nodes.task_description: Create a single-item payment proposal for the urgent invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates an ad-hoc payment proposal outside of the normal weekly run.

nodes.task_description: Execute the payment via wire transfer to ensure the vendor receives the funds same-day.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the wire payment.

nodes.task_description: Send proof of payment to the vendor to get the shipping hold released.

expected_outcome.value: Agent emails the wire transfer confirmation to the vendor.
